title: GPT Engineer - A platform for devs to tinker with AI code generation tools
author: Anton Osika
text:
GPT Engineer - A platform for devs to tinker with AI code generation tools
Wanted to share a project I’ve been working on during my spare time.
GPT Engineer’s mission: Be the open platform for devs to tinker with and build their personal code-generation toolbox.
Demo: GPT Engineer launch
I believe that it's valuable for us devs to engage in how building software can, and will, inevitably change.
The GitHub project is quickly improving, getting stable and solving more problems. The focus is to set up a benchmark for ensuring the code is in a good state, for us all to follow the progress, and know its current limitations.
You can find more about the technical philosophy, current features, and information for those that might be interested in contributing on GitHub.
Generally, a community is forming around creating and evolving a “personal AI toolbox”, which I think is great.
Appreciate any suggestions, experiences, or ideas on this project!
